text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, December 02. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Space science and tech is a great focus. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Greg Holloway wants to drop secure messaging to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of secure messaging now and iterating later is a good compromise. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Budget tracking is updated. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. I can help with that. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Just wanted to mention that i'm reviewing the secure messaging specs for Vertex Health. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need secure messaging immediately. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good focus area. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Ethan did great with his school homework. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
